name: The framework raises at least as many questions as it answers. Can the vital necrosis state be stabilized indefinitely, or does it inevitably decay? The 40-day protocol is an empirical endpoint, not a theoretical one. The thermodynamic analysis suggests no fundamental limit, but practical constraints - depletion of SAM, accumulation of degradation products - may impose a finite lifetime. Does the third state scale? A 10 mL vial is one thing — a 1 L bioreactor is another. The reaction-diffusion dynamics and the AHL concentration gradients scale with system size, potentially limiting the maximum volume. Can the self-modeling map support anything beyond fixed-point dynamics? A system at criticality is maximally sensitive to input — in principle, it could function as a reservoir computer. Can the pellicle learn? Is blood the only substrate that supports vital necrosis, or are there others?

phase_0.domain_name: The framework raises at least as many questions as it answers. Can the vital necrosis state be stabilized indefinitely, or does it inevitably decay? The 40-day protocol is an empirical endpoint, not a theoretical one. The thermodynamic analysis suggests no fundamental limit, but practical constraints - depletion of SAM, accumulation of degradation products - may impose a finite lifetime. Does the third state scale? A 10 mL vial is one thing — a 1 L bioreactor is another. The reaction-diffusion dynamics and the AHL concentration gradients scale with system size, potentially limiting the maximum volume. Can the self-modeling map support anything beyond fixed-point dynamics? A system at criticality is maximally sensitive to input — in principle, it could function as a reservoir computer. Can the pellicle learn? Is blood the only substrate that supports vital necrosis, or are there others?
phase_0.boundary_condition: The hermetic glass seal of the vial

VINIT.justification: Initial void of the third state, uncoagulated suspension before organization

TANCH.justification: Closes the thermodynamic system, imposing the topological winding number

AFWD.justification: Forward morphism building the active gel structure from monomers

AREV.justification: Reverse morphism of plasmin-mediated cleavage descending toward equilibrium

CLINK.justification: Sequential composition of the split-fuse loops over the kinetic timescale

IMSCRIB.justification: Identity where the pellicle models its own spatial DNA distribution

FSPLIT.justification: Branches the fibrin state into opposing crosslinking and lysis pathways

FFUSE.justification: Reconstitutes the fibrin state via detailed balance at critical concentration

EVALT.justification: Affirmative evaluation of the crosslinked active gel state

EVALF.justification: Negative evaluation of the degraded, lysis-dominated state

ENGAGR.justification: Paradice of being simultaneously metabolically dead and organizationally alive

IFIX.justification: Permanent irreversible record of the state in the 12-D VAE-Vita manifold

phase_3.false_description: Thermodynamic decay, substrate depletion, loss of coherence
phase_3.both_description: Vital Necrosis, metabolically dead yet organizationally alive

steps.domain_action: Drawn whole blood — initial void of the third state
Hermetic glass seal — closes the thermodynamic system
Fibrin polymerization — forward morphism building the active gel
Reversible Phase Separation — branches the fibrin state into opposing pathways
Factor XIIIa crosslinking — T-arm forward morphism building the network
Network Integrity — affirmative evaluation of the crosslinked state
Plasmin-mediated cleavage — F-arm reverse morphism degrading the network
Soluble Fragments — negative evaluation of the degraded state
Dynamic Fibrin Network — reconstitutes the fibrin state via detailed balance
40-day reaction-diffusion protocol — composition of the split-fuse loops
Self-recognition map — identity where the pellicle models its own DNA
Vital Necrosis — paradice of being simultaneously dead and self-organizing
Latent coordinate z_VN — permanent fixation in the VAE-Vita manifold
Hermetic glass seal — terminal boundary containing the fixed state

phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Non-enzymatic AHL quorum sensing and electromagnetic bias
phase_5.memory_mechanism: Sequence-dependent DNA fragment adsorption on fibrin
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: Ultradian rhythm entrainment matching operator 90-min cycle

phase_6.cycle_cost: Gravitational sedimentation and surface tension work
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: Sealed vial with lysed cells and dissipated gradients
phase_6.post_cycle_state: Self-organized pellicle at criticality with spatial patterns
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — entropy export via external fields balances internal proteolysis

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → TANCH → AFWD → FSPLIT → AFWD → EVALT → AREV → EVALF → FFUSE → CLINK → IMSCRIB → ENGAGR → IFIX → TANCH
-- Class: The framework raises at least as many questions as it answers. Can the vital necrosis state be stabilized indefinitely, or does it inevitably decay? The 40-day protocol is an empirical endpoint, not a theoretical one. The thermodynamic analysis suggests no fundamental limit, but practical constraints - depletion of SAM, accumulation of degradation products - may impose a finite lifetime. Does the third state scale? A 10 mL vial is one thing — a 1 L bioreactor is another. The reaction-diffusion dynamics and the AHL concentration gradients scale with system size, potentially limiting the maximum volume. Can the pellicle learn? Is blood the only substrate that supports vital necrosis, or are there others?
-- Fingerprint: sig=(8,2,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=14
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(3, 8)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑡  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑼 → 𐑾  | terminal object — connectivity boundary
--   [2] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑡 → 𐑚  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [3] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [4] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑚 → 𐑙  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [5] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [6] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [7] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [8] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑱  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [9] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑙 → 𐑠  | composition — regime coherence
--   [10] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑱 → 𐑳  | identity — self-imscription
--   [11] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑠 → 𐑭  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [12] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑳 → 𐑡  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [13] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑭 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def the_framework_raises_at_least_as_many_questions_as_it_answers_can_the_vital_necrosis_state_be_stabilized_indefinitely_or_does_it_inevitably_decay_the_40_day_protocol_is_an_empirical_endpoint_not_a_theoretical_one_the_thermodynamic_analysis_suggests_no_fundamental_limit_but_practical_constraints_depletion_of_sam_accumulation_of_degradation_products_may_impose_a_finite_lifetime_does_the_third_state_scale_a_10_ml_vial_is_one_thing_a_1_l_bioreactor_is_another_the_reaction_diffusion_dynamics_and_the_ahl_concentration_gradients_scale_with_system_size_potentially_limiting_the_maximum_volume_can_the_self_modeling_map_support_anything_beyond_fixed_point_dynamics_a_system_at_criticality_is_maximally_sensitive_to_input_in_principle_it_could_function_as_a_reservoir_computer_can_the_pellicle_learn_is_blood_the_only_substrate_that_supports_vital_necrosis_or_are_there_others_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑡)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (Drawn whole blood — initial void of the third state)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [1] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (Hermetic glass seal — closes the thermodynamic system)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑡 𐑚)  -- [2] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Fibrin polymerization — forward morphism building the active gel)
  -- FSPLIT [3] (gran := 𐑚) (Reversible Phase Separation — branches the fibrin state into opposing pathways) / FFUSE [8] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (3 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑾 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [4] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Factor XIIIa crosslinking — T-arm forward morphism building the network)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (Network Integrity — affirmative evaluation of the crosslinked state)
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (Plasmin-mediated cleavage — F-arm reverse morphism degrading the network)
      -- F-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (Soluble Fragments — negative evaluation of the degraded state))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [8]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑱)  -- [8] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (Dynamic Fibrin Network — reconstitutes the fibrin state via detailed balance)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑙 𐑠)  -- [9] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (40-day reaction-diffusion protocol — composition of the split-fuse loops)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑱 𐑳)  -- [10] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (Self-recognition map — identity where the pellicle models its own DNA)
  (.arrow 𐑳 𐑠 𐑭)  -- [11] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (Vital Necrosis — paradice of being simultaneously dead and self-organizing)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑳 𐑡)  -- [12] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (Latent coordinate z_VN — permanent fixation in the VAE-Vita manifold)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [13] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (Hermetic glass seal — terminal boundary containing the fixed state)
